OntologySyncBundlePath.description: Absolute path to a bundle version directory containing a *.vocab.json manifest and .wikitext entity files. Set this to enable ontology import via update.php.

OntologySyncRepoUrl.description: Git URL of the labki-ontology repository to clone.

OntologySyncRepoPath.description: Local filesystem path where the labki-ontology repo is cloned. Must be set for the extension to function.

OntologySyncStagingPath.description: Path for staging import artifacts. Defaults to $wgCacheDirectory/ontologysync-staging if null.

OntologySyncAutoRegisterStaging.description: If true, automatically register the staging directory with SMW's $smwgImportFileDirs when it contains a vocab.json.
